SWORD.title: Blade
SWORD.description: Three levels: [blue]White[/blue]/[gold]Yellow[/gold]/[red]Red[/red], corresponding to [blue]25%[/blue]/[gold]50%[/gold]/[red]100%[/red] increased damage from [gold]Attack[/gold] cards, lasting [blue]3[/blue] turns.
OPEN_SWORD.title: Sharpen Blade
OPEN_SWORD.description: If you have [gold]Blade[/gold], raise it by one level; otherwise, gain [gold]White Blade[/gold].
DERIVE.title: Derive X
DERIVE.description: Choose [blue]X[/blue] cards of a specified type from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and add them to your hand.
DERIVE.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose [blue]X[/blue] cards of the specified type from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to add to your hand.
CANCEL.title: Cancel
CANCEL.description:
Success depends on the [gold]Cancel[/gold] level ([purple]Spell[/purple] → [red]Super[/red] → [gold]Normal[/gold]).
If successful, this card can be played ignoring [gold]Stiffness[/gold] (removing it), and return the previous card you played this turn to your hand (except [gold]Power[/gold] cards).
